series_metadata.series_description: Applications, permits, plats, well records and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Permanent ; Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Retain 5 years after enhanced recovery wells are plugged, unless scanned to electronic format or microfilm . After paper copy is scanned to an electronic format or microfilm, it may be destroyed., Electronic: Permanent ; Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Recycle
